wins.event: Q2 revenue $12.5B, +43% YoY; FY 2024 guide raised to $51B from $50B
AI revenue +280% YoY to $3.1B; 2024 AI revenue raised to >$11B from >$10B
Networking $3.8B, +44% YoY; 7 of 8 largest AI clusters use Broadcom Ethernet
VMware integration progressing — ABV $1.9B, run-rate spending down to $1.6B from $2.3B pre-deal

risks.event: Broadband -39% YoY; FY guide lowered to -high-30s from -30% prior
Server storage -27% YoY; FY guide -20% range vs prior -mid-20s (slight improvement)
Industrial -10% YoY; FY guide lowered to -double-digit from -high-single-digit
Semi gross margin -370bps YoY on higher mix of custom AI accelerators (lower-margin)

guidance.notes: FY 2024 consolidated revenue raised to $51B from $50B. AI revenue raised to >$11B; networking growth raised to +40%; broadband cut deeper to -high-30s. Net direction: raise.

_notes: Solid AI/networking story drives FY guide raise. Cyclical non-AI weakness deeper than expected; CEO frames AI tailwinds as more than offsetting. Stock split announced.
